description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a symmetrical front facade, featuring large rectangular windows and a central entryway flanked by decorative columns. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding, complemented by a paved driveway leading to a detached double garage. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a spacious backyard with a well-maintained lawn. The front yard is paved with a patterned surface and includes a black car parked near the entrance. The roof is flat, and the house has a modern yet classic appearance with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The interior layout is partially visible, showing open living spaces and multiple rooms.
description: A two-story suburban house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a central entryway, and a detached double garage, surrounded by a wooden fence and a large backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, paved driveway, and double garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, car, and the open backyard with visible interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, back of the house, and the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage doors, driveway, and the rear entry to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with double doors, decorative columns, and a paved approach
